summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 資料中心強勁需求與互連技術布局，Marvell 營收動能顯著，儘管面臨中國貿易調查的短期逆風。

bullish.title: MRVL's Data Center Revenues Hit $6.1B: Can the Momentum Continue?
bullish.reason: 資料中心營收達 61 億美元，顯示 AI 相關矽晶片與互連技術需求強勁，為公司核心成長引擎。

bullish.title: Marvell: Building The AI Interconnect Stack Of The Next Decade
bullish.reason: 分析師看好其在光子學與互連技術的併購策略，預期將顯著提升 2027 至 2028 財年的營收展望。

bullish.title: Marvell Technology Inc. (MRVL) Unveils Advanced Switch for AI Data Center Scale-Up Infrastructure
bullish.reason: 推出針對 AI 資料中心擴展的先進交換器，強化其在基礎設施市場的競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Marvell (MRVL) Earnings Beat Driven by Strong AI Data Center Demand
bullish.reason: 財報優於預期，且高利潤率的業務結構使其被視為優質的投資標的。

bullish.title: Do New AI Connectivity Launches and Dividend Plans Change The Bull Case For Marvell (MRVL)?
bullish.reason: 宣布每股 0.06 美元的季度股利，展現公司現金流穩定性與對股東的回饋承諾。

bearish.title: Qorvo, Skyworks Solutions, Penguin Solutions, Microchip Technology, and Marvell Technology Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 中國啟動貿易壁壘調查，導致半導體類股普遍下跌，對 Marvell 的供應鏈與市場准入構成潛在風險。

neutral.title: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅為市場熱度分析，提供投資人基本面檢視建議，無實質營運變動。

neutral.title: CRDO vs. MRVL: Which AI Connectivity Stock Is the Better Buy?
neutral.reason: 針對同業 Credo 與 Marvell 的比較分析，旨在協助投資人評估策略差異，非單一公司利多或利空。

neutral.title: Marvel Biosciences Selects Novotech as CRO for Its Phase I Clinical Trial of MB-204
neutral.reason: 此新聞涉及 Marvel Biosciences (代碼 MBCOF)，與 Marvell Technology (MRVL) 無關，屬名稱混淆。

neutral.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Marvell Technology 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
neutral.reason: 回顧性歷史績效分析，對當前股價走勢無直接影響。
